A '''Vagabond suit''' was a spacesuit developed by [[Korren Starchaser]] and equipped with sophisticated [[Sensor/Legends|sensor]] systems. The sensor units were mounted on the shoulders and chest of the suit, so the wearer could still perform manual tasks without being encumbered. The sensors could store their data on a small on-board [[Computer/Legends|computer]] or use the comm relay programs built into the helmet to send the data back to a [[Starship/Legends|ship]]. It could perform such tasks as [[Radiation/Legends|radiation]] level scanning and mineral analysis. Vagabond suits cost 2,500 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] each.<ref name="SD" />
